summary: Iteration 57 - Three Backlog Features Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (Incident reporting, SSO routes, auth). Frontend: All UI components verified - Operations tab with Service Health (4 cards), Incidents panel with 'All Clear' and Export PDF button, Storage Analytics; RBAC Management with visual permission grid and grid/list toggle; Booking Calendar with weekly availability overview; Marketplace notary profile with Write Review button.

issues: Availability preview not shown for John Notary - expected when notary has no availability data configured
Slot grouping (morning/afternoon/evening) not visible when no slots available for selected date - expected behavior

critical_code_review_comments: Incident reporting endpoints correctly return structured data with incidents array, summary, and period_days
PDF export returns valid PDF with correct content-type and magic bytes
SSO routes (Auth0/Okta) still working after refactor to separate files
RBAC Management visual permission grid is well-implemented with toggle between grid/list views
Booking Calendar has weekly availability overview and slot period grouping structure in place
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users and notaries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three backlog features verified: (1) Automated Incident Reporting - GET /api/admin/incidents returns incidents array with summary, GET /api/admin/incidents/export-pdf returns valid PDF, requires admin role. (2) RBAC Visual Editor - accessible via Organizations > [org] > Roles tab, has grid/list view toggle, permission matrix with role columns and permission rows. (3) Booking Calendar - at /book/{notary_id}, has weekly availability overview and slot period grouping (morning/afternoon/evening) when slots are available. Operations tab in Admin Dashboard shows Service Health panel with 4 service cards (MongoDB, AWS S3, Stripe, Hedera), Incidents panel with 'All Clear' state and Export PDF button, Storage Analytics panel.
